epics.title: Walking skeleton: minimal Express service + EvalRunResult schema + scoring core
Keystone adapter, live
epics.note: Scheduled immediately after epic 1 on purpose: first real exercise of the schema.

epics.title: Dogfood self-adapter: load own telemetry, score it, generate a report
epics.note: Not in the original product-brief epic list. Added because the harness's own telemetry (Article 10) is already EvalRunResult-shaped, making this the cheapest real proof that FR-1/FR-5 work against genuine harness-native data, and a minimal first cut of FR-10's report generator. Epic 4 extends this with FR-9 trend persistence and real Tier A/B data rather than duplicating it.

epics.title: Report generator + trend persistence
epics.note: FR-10's minimal report shape was already built in epic-2b against dogfood data; this epic extends it with FR-9 trend persistence and wires in real Tier A/B data.
